meaning: adj.缓慢的,[动]缓步类的n.[动]缓步类动物,节肢动物
examples: Now, a new genome has been published of an exceptionally hardy tardigrade species.
And if the experiment works on a virus, they hope to move on to something that is indisputably alive: a tardigrade.
The Tardigrade is almost dead in the cryptobiotic stage, other than the fact that it can revive itself from this state.
